data.body: In settings.ts: remove all OpenRouter imports, OPENROUTER_AGENT_COMMAND, resolveSelectedOpenRouterAgentConfig(), toOpenRouterTarget(), resolveOpenRouterAgents(), resolveOpenRouterAgentById(), resolveKeychainSecrets(). Remove OpenRouter merge from getRegisteredAgents/getActionAgent/getStepAgent. Remove keychain logic from saveSettings(). Add opencode to SCANNABLE_AGENTS. Add readOpenCodeModels() helper (exec `opencode models`). Add opencode case in inspectInstalledAgentMetadata(). Update buildAgentImportOptions() for opencode.
data.title: Remove OpenRouter from settings and add OpenCode scanning
